heading: Congressional declaration of purpose
label: 1272 Congressional declaration of purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to implement the policy set out in by instituting a national wild and scenic rivers system, by designating the initial components of that system, and by prescribing the methods by which and standards according to which additional components may be added to the system from time to time.section 1271 of this title
notes: CodificationSection consists of subsec. (c) of . Subsecs. (a) and (b) of section 1 are classified to section 1271 and section 1271 note, respectively.section 1 of Pub. L. 90–542
